Appearances:
Plaintiff in pro per Zahid Shaikh is present.
Defendants Vincent Scott and Shree Shelton are present.
Attorney Hope Greenhill appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of SEP-02-2014 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
